caption: A man with short dark hair, wearing a grey blazer over a light-colored button-down shirt, is speaking on a stage against a dark purple background illuminated by diagonal purple light beams. He is wearing a tan-colored headset microphone. Throughout the sequence, the man is engaged in an active conversation, gesturing with his hands and shifting his facial expressions. In the beginning, he looks slightly to his right with his mouth open as if mid-sentence, his left hand raised. He then shifts his gaze and expression, bringing both hands forward in expressive gestures. He briefly looks downward with a neutral expression before looking back up and to his right with a slight smile. The camera remains in a steady medium shot, focusing on the man's upper body as he speaks.
